title: 15cm Premium Goatskin Leather Gloves
shortDescription: Natural lanolin content of the hide ensures the glove is soft and supple. Consists of natural premium full grain goatskin leather. Syntax thread & a 6-inch chrome leather elbow cuff for additional protection
